series_metadata.series_description: The tax rate abstract is a list of the property taxes levied by every political subdivision within each of Ohio''''s 88 counties. The tax rate abstract is filed annually with the Ohio Department of Taxation by the county auditors.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: The abstract to be maintained for 10 years with the OH Dept of Taxation. After 10 years the abstract is to be sent to the Ohio Historical Society., Paper: Archives
